checks.detail: Instruction asks for correctness vs CommonMark reference and speed comparable to production C parser; verifier scores exactly those two (50% correctness vs expected HTML + 50% median-of-3 perf vs cmark).

CommonMark 0.31.2 spec is linked, all in-scope inline sections are enumerated, and stdin/stdout interface + build path are explicit; internal 5x cmark perf threshold is hidden but agent only needs to optimize, not target a number.
Dockerfile installs gcc/make/build-essential; workspace ships Makefile + md2html.c starter matching the documented build command; cmark is correctly root-only and only unlocked on the oracle path.
solution/solve.sh exists (63 lines), writes the oracle marker and installs a cmark-execve wrapper that the verifier permits via token-gated bypass.

117 hidden cases cover the same CommonMark sections as the 268 visible cases (only additional section is 'Soft line breaks', which is explicitly listed as required in instruction.md) — structural variants, no new requirements.
